case_title: DRAPIER A CA CORP DBA WINE DISTRIBUTORS VS WINE SHOP, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,070.96 FILED BY DRAPIER A CA CORP DBA WINE DISTRIBUTORS AS TO DEFENDANT WINE SHOP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRAPIER A CA CORP DBA WINE DISTRIBUTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINE SHOP, INC. $2,070.60 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,130.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $9.92 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WINE SHOP, INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WINE SHOP, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WINE SHOP, INC.
